note: Synthesized music track with known BPM, key, and section layout. The WAV is fixed in sources so the music-information-retrieval anchors are deterministic and reproducible from the synthesis recipe in design_notes.md.

entries.description: 32-second 22050 Hz mono WAV synthesized at 120 BPM in C major with a 5-part intro/verse/chorus/bridge/outro layout. RMS-energy peaks at the chorus (12-20s).
